summary: Iteration 45 - Bug fix verification: Restaurant logo now saves and displays correctly in Settings page. The fix added onError handler for logo image and properly updates restaurantLogoPreview state after save.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/settings/restaurant - returns logo_url correctly - PASSED
Backend: Logo file accessible at /api/uploads/logos/{filename}.jpg - PASSED (200)
Frontend: Navigate to Settings > المطعم tab - PASSED
Frontend: Current logo displayed correctly (not hidden) - PASSED
Frontend: Upload new logo - preview shows blob URL immediately - PASSED
Frontend: Save settings - success toast 'تم حفظ إعدادات المطعم بنجاح' - PASSED
Frontend: Logo URL updated to server URL after save (state update fix verified) - PASSED
Frontend: Page reload - logo still visible and persists - PASSED

bug_fix_verification.fix_description: 1. Added onError handler to hide broken images gracefully. 2. Fixed state update after save to properly set restaurantLogoPreview with correct URL format.
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: VERIFIED - Logo displays correctly, saves properly, and persists after page reload

test_scenarios_executed.result: PASSED - Logo visible with correct URL
PASSED - Logo uploaded, saved, and URL updated from blob to server URL

critical_code_review_comments: Logo display fix correctly handles multiple URL formats (http, /api, relative)
onError handler prevents broken image display by hiding the element
State update after save correctly transforms /api URLs to full API URLs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 verified the logo display and save bug fix. The logo now: 1) Displays correctly when loaded from server, 2) Shows preview immediately when new file selected, 3) Updates to server URL after save (not stuck on blob URL), 4) Persists after page reload. All tests passed. Logo files are stored in /app/backend/uploads/logos/ and served via /api/uploads/logos/{filename}.jpg
